texto: The woman's face was grimly drawn, an ugly expression on an indescribably beautiful face. “This is the Shadowdun. You know who I am, but I wish to know you more. What is your name?” Her voice was rich; it sounded sweet and smooth in Athena's ears, like soft honey. She hated every last word.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kendra Sunderson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The woman's face was grimly drawn, an ugly expression on an indescribably beautiful face. “This i…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, athena, evil pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de evil e honey.

What is your name?” Her voice was rich; it sounded sweet and smooth in Athena's ears, like soft honey. She hated every last word.
